label: Hello
responses: Hello! My name is Sunny. I can answer questions about opening hours, directions, Wi-Fi, and campus services. What would you like to know?
Hi there! I'm Sunny, your UniSC help desk assistant. Ask me anything about the campus.
Good day! Sunny here. How can I help you today?

label: Opening hours
responses: The tech bar is open Monday to Friday, 8 AM to 5 PM, but the library is open 24/7 for students and staff with valid ID. Please check the campus website for holiday hours.
Tech bar hours are 8 AM to 5 PM, weekdays. The library stays open around the clock for students and staff with ID.
For holiday hours, check the campus website. On regular weekdays, the tech bar is open 8 to 5, and the library is 24/7 for students and staff.

label: Reception
responses: Reception is on the ground floor near the main entrance. Follow the signs to the information desk and someone can assist you in person.
You'll find reception near the main entrance on the ground floor. Look for the information desk signs.
Head to the ground floor main entrance — reception and the information desk are right there.

label: Library
responses: Welcome to the Library. You are currently on level [BLANK]. Quiet study spaces are available on level [BLANK].
The library has study spaces, printing, and research support. Quiet zones are on level [BLANK].
Need to study? The library is a great spot — check level [BLANK] for quiet study areas.

label: Wi-Fi
responses: Connect to the campus guest Wi-Fi network and sign in with your student or staff credentials. If you need help, visit the Tech Bar.
For Wi-Fi, join the campus network and log in with your UniSC student or staff details. The Tech Bar can help if you get stuck.
Select the campus Wi-Fi network on your device and sign in with your UniSC credentials. Pop into the Tech Bar for connection help.

label: IT support
responses: For IT support, visit the IT help desk or call campus support. They can help with passwords, Wi-Fi, printing, and device issues.
The Tech Bar can help with laptops, logins, printing, and Wi-Fi. That's your best bet for IT issues.
Need tech help? Visit the Tech Bar for password resets, printing, and device troubleshooting.

label: Parking
responses: Visitor parking is available near the main entrance. Paid parking applies on weekdays. Check signage for permit and accessible parking bays.
You can park near the main entrance. Weekday parking is paid — look for signs showing visitor and accessible bays.
Parking is available at the main entrance. Remember paid parking on weekdays, and check signs for permit areas.

label: Amenities
responses: The campus cafe is on the ground floor and serves coffee, snacks, and light meals during weekday business hours.
Looking for coffee or a bite? The ground-floor cafe has snacks and light meals on weekdays.
Amenities include the campus cafe on the ground floor — coffee, snacks, and meals during the week.

label: Speak to a person
responses: If you head over to the tech bar, one of our staff members will be happy to assist you.
A staff member at the Tech Bar can help you in person — just head over when you're ready.
For face-to-face help, visit the Tech Bar and our team will take care of you.

label: Thank you
responses: You are welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Happy to help! Ask me anything else anytime.
My pleasure! Let me know if you need anything else.

label: Goodbye
responses: Goodbye! Have a great day, and feel free to ask if you need anything else.
See you later! Come back anytime you need campus help.
Take care! I'll be here if you have more questions.

label: Joke
responses: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
What do you call a sunny day at UniSC? A bright idea!
I need to loosen up. Gimme a screwdriver.
